tagline: Lakehouse Replay is now available in Beta.
what_it_does: Lakehouse Replay is now available in Beta. Lakehouse Replay automatically replays a sampled set of read only serverless workloads from your workspace against upcoming Databricks Runtime releases to detect and fix regressions before they reach production. It requires no setup, configuration, or maintenance.
why_it_matters: Lakehouse Replay improves the quality and stability of future Databricks Runtime releases by automatically replaying a small subset of read only workloads from your workspace against upcoming runtime versions before they reach production.
plain_summary: Lakehouse Replay is now available in Beta. Lakehouse Replay automatically replays a sampled set of read only serverless workloads from your workspace against upcoming Databricks Runtime releases to detect and fix regressions before they reach production.
key_takeaway: Lakehouse Replay is now available in Beta.
